$comment: Declarative DESIRED Cloudflare DNS state for transscendsurvival.org. Source of truth for drift detection only (scripts/cf-dns-check.mts). This file does NOT apply anything: no agent or workflow mutates Cloudflare from it. Editing it changes what 'no drift' means, not the live zone. CONTAINS NO SECRETS.

invariants.$comment: Apex and www are both cut to Cloudflare Pages. The 2026-06-22 outage was a proxied hostname BEFORE the Pages custom domain was active; this posture is valid only after each Pages custom domain is ACTIVE. The guard is inverted for both names: they must stay PROXIED CNAMEs to the Pages project.
